dimensions.rationale: The receipt binds the requested baseline, candidate, and tree and limits captured gates to LOCAL_SYNTHETIC_ONLY with zero remote writes.

The post-review drift check protects only workflows whose names begin moomooau-stage6-, not all workflows as required, so an unprotected workflow can drift after review without blocking provenance closure.
Captured evidence explicitly remains local/synthetic and reports no protected execution or remote writes; this review makes no production claim.
The reviewed receipt reports zero remote service writes and removed ephemeral outputs, so no external rollback action is claimed or required by this local evidence.

findings.finding: PRODUCTION_RUN is capacity-gated and KILL-007 disables production_enabled, closing the prior UNKNOWN/RED and Kill Criterion bypass.

The required post-review no-drift closure is bypassable for workflows: PROTECTED_AFTER_REVIEW_PREFIXES admits only .github/workflows/moomooau-stage6- and therefore does not reject post-review changes to other workflows, including production or Stage 7 workflow paths.
findings.required_fix: Reject candidate..HEAD drift under the complete .github/workflows/ scope required by the closure contract, add adversarial regression coverage for non-stage6 workflow drift, recapture applicable evidence, and obtain fresh independent re-reviews.

limitations: This static local re-review did not execute tests or validators.
It does not prove remote CI, protected Oracle behavior, real Gmail/private-repository behavior, production health, or final acceptance.
summary: FAIL: RMD05-001 is resolved, but the required post-review workflow-drift closure is incomplete and bypassable.
